ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_operations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Universally unique identifier for the operation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., Export database) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object the operation relates to (e.g., db, mail, notification) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., exportContent, importContent) */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the object affected by the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the operation record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the operation record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the operation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the operation failed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the operation in seconds */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a notification was sent for this operation */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to user feedback record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_operations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_operations_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_operations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
